summary: Frontend UI testing for stage percentages, overall quality bar, and redesigned inspection form. All 10 features verified successfully.
seed_data_creation: Used existing TEST-FIX-MULTI-REJ batch, moved 5 crates to QC Stage 1 to create pending crates for inspection form testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI features for stage percentages and inspection form redesign verified. Batch 660G-APR-001 has 222 rejected bottles (7.7% rejection rate). TEST-FIX-MULTI-REJ batch now has 5 pending crates at QC Stage 1.

details: Stage cards show pass % and reject % based on bottles (rejected_bottles / (received_crates * bottles_per_crate) * 100)
Batch 660G-APR-001: QC Stage 1 (98.1% pass, 1.9% reject), QC Stage 2 (98.4% pass, 1.6% reject), Labeling (98.3% pass, 1.7% reject), Final QC (97.5% pass, 2.5% reject)
TEST-FIX-MULTI-REJ: QC Stage 1 (93.3% pass, 6.7% reject)
Overall Quality bar shows total pass % and reject % with progress bar
Batch 660G-APR-001: 92.3% pass, 7.7% rejected (2,880 total bottles)
TEST-FIX-MULTI-REJ: 99.0% pass, 1.0% rejected (2,400 total bottles)
Progress bar shows green (pass) and red (reject) segments proportionally
Summary bar shows reject % under Total Rejected
Batch 660G-APR-001: Total Rejected 222 bottles with 7.7% displayed
TEST-FIX-MULTI-REJ: Total Rejected 24 bottles with 1.0% displayed
Mini progress bars (green/red) appear under stage balance rows when there are rejections
Found 4 green progress segments and 5 red segments on batch 660G-APR-001
Progress bars show proportional pass/reject ratio
Percentages are NOT shown when received=0 (no data yet)
Verified on stages with 0 received crates - no percentage displayed
Emerald gradient header with 'Record Inspection' title
Header shows stage name, pending count, and bottles/crate info
Clean entry cards with Resource, Date, Crates Inspected fields
Add Entry button in header for multiple entries
Live stats bar updates as user enters data
Shows: crates count, bottles count, rejected count with %, passed count with %
Progress bar updates in real-time showing pass/reject ratio
Example: '2 crates | 48 bottles | 3 rejected (6.3%) | 45 passed (93.8%)'
Per-entry pass % with color coding (green/amber/red badge)
Shows bottles count, rejected count, passed count, and pass % badge
Color coding: green for >=95%, amber for >=80%, red for <80%
Example: '48 bottles | 3 rejected | 45 passed | 94% pass'
Rejection quantity field has red-bordered styling
Field classes include: border-red-200, text-red-600, bg-red-50/50
Rejection Details section has clear visual separation
Cancel button closes form and resets entries
Form is no longer visible after clicking Cancel
Entries are reset to default empty state

ui_verification_screenshots: .screenshots/batch_detail_all_features.png - Overall quality bar, summary bar, stage cards with percentages
.screenshots/batch_detail_scrolled.png - All 4 stage cards with mini progress bars
.screenshots/inspection_form_test.png - Redesigned inspection form with emerald header
.screenshots/inspection_form_filled.png - Live stats bar, per-entry pass %, rejection styling
